message: Potential use-after-realloc: 'td' may be stale after grow call to '_TIFFReserveLargeEnoughWriteBuffer()'.

assertions.presence_assertion_hint: /* model: td must still alias tif->tif_dir at line 503 */
assertions.reachability_assertion: klee_assert(0);  /* must be placed immediately before the vulnerable instruction */

notes: Non-in-path helpers (tif_preencode, tif_encodetile, tif_postencode) are stub candidates.
Groom TIFFDirectory and TIFF structs to avoid null derefs before line 503.
